summary: Two-part session 185. PART 1 (morning): grew power-ups 5→8 (fireball #6, safety-net, extra-life #8), per-level background themes + per-level sound, and a WEIGHTED gift pool. PART 2 (this resume): opened onto an already-active 185 whose session file was 5 commits stale — refreshed it instead of blind-bumping, then shipped a 3-feature arc that crossed the game from feature-rich to feature-rich + skill/score-chase + real level design: (1) weighted gift pool committed (803f4e2), (2) COMBO MULTIPLIER (bd195f1) — airborne brick chains score points×min(chain,9), reset on paddle, HUD ×N pill; (3) SPECIAL BRICK KINDS (20e01e4) — unbreakable solids (excluded from level-clear to avoid deadlock) + explosive bricks (radius blast that chains AND feeds the combo). The three compound: explosive chain → combo spike → score run. Moti playtested live — screenshot showed COMBO ×9 (cap) with 5 gifts stacked (NET/FIRE/SLOW/WIDE/GUN). 'test it its beautiful'. tsc -b + vite build green throughout (67.58 kB gzip). All committed + pushed, tree clean.
